Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Text Ruling

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY THIS MATTER SHOULD NOT BE STAYED
Off Calendar May-01-2026 Continued To Jun-01-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY THIS MATTER SHOULD NOT BE STAYED

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: This court previously issued an order to show cause why this case should not be stayed until final disposition of Banga v. UCSF Medical Center, CGC-16-549780 ("Banga I"), which has factual overlap with this case. Plaintiff filed a First Amended Complaint on April 16, 2026. In light of Plaintiff's amended complaint, the court continues the hearing on its order to show cause to June 1, 2026. Plaintiff may file a supplemental brief of no more than 15 pages in opposition to a stay order by May 15, 2026. Defendants may file a supplemental brief of no more than 15 pages by May 22, 2026. Because the purpose of any stay would be to serve judicial efficiency by holding this case in abeyance while the Court of Appeal considers potentially overlapping issues in Banga I, and to avoid wasted litigation efforts pending final resolution of Banga I, the court extends Defendants' time to respond to the First Amended Complaint to June 15, 2026. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
